.mcp.json.name: .mcp.json
.mcp.json.description: MCP server configuration file that registers the local GraphMem HTTP server at localhost:47821, enabling Claude Code and other agents to auto-discover codebase memory tools (/preflight, /search, /dependencies, /history).

.mycelium.config.example.json.name: .mycelium.config.example.json
.mycelium.config.example.json.description: Example configuration schema defining team-based file filtering (core, security, finance, data, ui, api), parser globs/excludes, summarizer model selection (claude-haiku-4-5), and MCP server port. Serves as template for project-specific .mycelium/config.json.

.mycelium/graph.json.name: .mycelium/graph.json
.mycelium/graph.json.description: Persisted dependency graph state containing semantic nodes (files, functions, classes) and edges (imports, calls, containment). Updated incrementally by the parser and watcher; queried by the MCP server for preflight/search/xref.

CLAUDE.md.name: CLAUDE.md
CLAUDE.md.description: Agent system prompt auto-generated into project root after `mycelium init`. Documents mandatory 5-step workflow (task start → preflight → history → xref → edit → task done), query examples, and team lens configuration. Read by Claude Code on startup.

README.md.name: README.md
README.md.description: High-level project documentation explaining Mycelium's purpose (reduce AI context burn from 30–40 files to 4–6 via semantic preflight), CLI commands (init, serve, scan, task, search), and quick-start workflow with curl examples.

ui/myc-inject.js.name: ui/myc-inject.js
ui/myc-inject.js.description: Embedded mascot (SVG fungi character) with voice lines, contextual reactions, drag-to-position UI, easter eggs, and dark theme styling. Injected into graph viewer HTML to provide interactive feedback (preflight alerts, cycle detection, session events).

src/sessions.ts.name: sessions.ts
src/sessions.ts.description: SessionManager class tracking bounded work sessions: lightweight file snapshots (line count + mtime) on start, change detection on completion, git diff capture, and structured result recording in .mycelium/sessions.json. Exports types (TaskSession, FileChange, SessionResult) and helpers (formatDuration, walkSourceFiles).

src/sessions.ts::getGitDiff.name: getGitDiff
src/sessions.ts::getGitDiff.signature: function getGitDiff(projectRoot: string, rel: string): string | null

src/cli.ts.name: cli.ts
src/cli.ts.description: Commander.js CLI entry point implementing commands (init, serve, scan, task, search, key, debug) with global ~/.mycelium/config.json for API keys. Orchestrates graph scanning (parser + optional CBM adapter), summarization (Claude Haiku), file watcher, and session management. Generates CLAUDE.md and .mcp.json on first run.

src/cli.ts::runScan.name: runScan
src/cli.ts::runScan.signature: function runScan(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig, force = false): Promise<number>

src/cli.ts::runSummarize.name: runSummarize
src/cli.ts::runSummarize.signature: function runSummarize(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig): Promise<void>

src/cli.ts::startWatcher.name: startWatcher
src/cli.ts::startWatcher.signature: function startWatcher(root: string, store: GraphStore, config: GraphMemConfig, onUpdate?: (): void

src/bootstrap.ts.name: bootstrap.ts
src/bootstrap.ts.description: Writes agent bootstrap files (CLAUDE.md system prompt + .mcp.json server config) into project root after initial scan. Merges gracefully with existing files; generates both mandatory workflow docs and service discovery for Claude Code.

src/bootstrap.ts::writeMcpJson.name: writeMcpJson
src/bootstrap.ts::writeMcpJson.signature: function writeMcpJson(workspaceRoot: string, config: GraphMemConfig): void

ui/index.html.name: index.html
ui/index.html.description: Main HTML entry point for a D3.js-based code dependency graph visualization tool called 'Mycelium Graph'. Renders an interactive SVG canvas with sidebar panels for node inspection, search, history, and dependency analysis, featuring dark theme styling with custom CSS variables.

ui/index.html::applyFlowColors.name: applyFlowColors
ui/index.html::applyFlowColors.signature: function applyFlowColors(out, inC, save = true): void

ui/index.html::depList.name: depList
ui/index.html::depList.signature: function depList(items, cssClass, labelText, key): void

ui/index.html::copyAsMarkdown.name: copyAsMarkdown
ui/index.html::copyAsMarkdown.signature: function copyAsMarkdown(nodeData, imports, importedBy, btnEl): void

src/parser/treeSitter.ts.name: treeSitter.ts
src/parser/treeSitter.ts.description: Parses source files across multiple languages (JS/TS, HTML, CSS, Python, Rust) using regex-based extraction and path alias resolution, producing a GraphNode for the file and GraphEdge entries for imports, exports, and symbol relationships. Caches tsconfig path aliases to resolve @/ and ~/ prefixes.

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::resolveRelativ.name: resolveRelative
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::resolveRelativ.signature: function resolveRelative(fromDir: string, importPath: string): string | null

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::extractSymbols.name: extractSymbols
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::extractSymbols.signature: function extractSymbols(content: string, filePath: string, hash: string, now: number): GraphNode[]

src/parser/treeSitter.ts::edgeId.name: edgeId
src/parser/treeSitter.ts::edgeId.signature: function edgeId(from: string, kind: string, to: string): string

src/parser/detect.ts.name: detect.ts
src/parser/detect.ts.description: Detects project type (TypeScript, Python, Rust, Go, etc.) from config files and intelligently builds glob patterns for source code discovery, falling back to directory scanning when tsconfig is unavailable. Augments globs with asset directories to ensure HTML/CSS imports are extracted.

src/parser/detect.ts::addAssetDirs.name: addAssetDirs
src/parser/detect.ts::addAssetDirs.signature: function addAssetDirs(root: string, globs: string[]): string[]

src/integrations/cbm-adapter.ts.name: cbm-adapter.ts
src/integrations/cbm-adapter.ts.description: Adapter bridging codebase-memory-mcp (cbm) CLI into Mycelium's graph store, invoking cbm's multi-language structural analysis (158 languages) and converting nodes/edges to Mycelium format. Provides traceFunction() for call graph queries and detectChanges() for risk analysis.

src/history/logger.ts.name: logger.ts
src/history/logger.ts.description: Tracks file changes with task context and agent attribution (human, claude-code, cursor). Persists ChangeEntry objects to JSON with active task/agent metadata; provides query methods grouped by file, task, or agent for timeline reconstruction.

src/graph/summarizer.ts.name: summarizer.ts
src/graph/summarizer.ts.description: Batches file nodes to Claude Haiku API for AI-generated 1–2 sentence descriptions and tag arrays. Parses responses into structured descriptions and updates GraphStore; handles graceful fallback if API key is missing or request fails.

src/graph/summarizer.ts::buildSummaryPro.name: buildSummaryPrompt
src/graph/summarizer.ts::buildSummaryPro.signature: function buildSummaryPrompt(files: Array<{ nodeId: string; path: string; content: string }>): string

src/graph/summarizer.ts::parseSummaryRes.name: parseSummaryResponse
src/graph/summarizer.ts::parseSummaryRes.signature: function parseSummaryResponse(text: string, expectedIds: string[]): SummarizeResponse[]

src/graph/store.ts.name: store.ts
src/graph/store.ts.description: In-memory graph database persisting nodes and edges to JSON, with lazy save scheduling. Supports upsert, search by keyword (with stop-word filtering), dependency lookup, team-based filtering via TeamLens, and entry-point detection. Resolves import edges to handle path aliasing.

src/graph/store.ts::matchGlob.name: matchGlob
src/graph/store.ts::matchGlob.signature: function matchGlob(pattern: string, filePath: string): boolean

src/graph/schema.ts.name: schema.ts
src/graph/schema.ts.description: TypeScript type definitions for the core graph model: GraphNode (file, function, class, etc.), GraphEdge (imports, calls, extends, etc.), TeamLens for role-based filtering, and GraphMemConfig for project settings. Also defines NodeSummary and SubGraph for API responses.

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts.name: embedding-engine.ts
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts.description: Semantic vector search using OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small with local cache in .mycelium/embeddings.json. Supports single/expanded queries, similarity search, and orphan pruning; gracefully degrades if API key is absent.

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::cosine.name: cosine
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::cosine.signature: function cosine(a: number[], b: number[]): number

src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::initEngin.name: initEngine
src/graph/embedding-engine.ts::initEngin.signature: function initEngine(myceliumDir: string, openAiKey?: string): EmbeddingEngine

src/mcp/server.ts::saveRoadmapFile.name: saveRoadmapFile
src/mcp/server.ts::saveRoadmapFile.signature: function saveRoadmapFile(storeDir: string, roadmap: Roadmap): void

ui/index.html::bezierD.name: bezierD
ui/index.html::bezierD.signature: function bezierD(sx, sy, tx, ty): void

ui/index.html::_rmapHover.name: _rmapHover
ui/index.html::_rmapHover.signature: function _rmapHover(d, edges, nodeGs, simLinks, svg, nodeR): void

ui/index.html::_fitRoadmapTree.name: _fitRoadmapTree
ui/index.html::_fitRoadmapTree.signature: function _fitRoadmapTree(svg, zoom, containerW, containerH, nodes): void

ui/index.html::_rmapHoverV2.name: _rmapHoverV2
ui/index.html::_rmapHoverV2.signature: function _rmapHoverV2(d, edges, nodeGs, simLinks, gMain, nodeR): void
